ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal is Coming Up – Action Needed
ham.body:
Hi John,

We hope you're enjoying the features of XYZ SaaS platform! This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will expire on 15th May 2026. To keep uninterrupted access, please renew your plan before the expiry date.

Renewal Details:
- Plan: Enterprise
- Amount: $499 per month
- Billing Cycle: Monthly

Click <URL> to review and renew your subscription. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or call our support team at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet (Wallet ID: 0xABC123XYZ) has been temporarily suspended due to suspected fraudulent activity. To avoid permanent lockout and potential loss of funds, you must verify your identity immediately.

Please log in to <URL> and complete the verification process within the next 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in your wallet being permanently disabled.

If you believe this is a mistake, reply to this email with your transaction ID and account details. For urgent assistance, call our support hotline at 1800-987-654.

Regards,
Financial Security Team
